emails.subject: Re: additional names
emails.body: Re: additional names Bryan The process for approving these involves sending the names to the General Counsels of the various operating companies here in Houston. Several of them then send the lists to the senior business people in their organizations. Unless there is a real urgency, I would suggest that we send the list all at once instead of piecemeal. What do you think? Mark Bryan Seyfried 05/30/2000 08:09 AM

emails.subject: Re: additional names
emails.body: Re: additional names Bryan The process for approving these involves sending the names to the General Counsels of the various operating companies here in Houston. Several of them then send the lists to the senior business people in their organizations. Unless there is a real urgency, I would suggest that we send the list all at once instead of piecemeal. emails.subject: Re: additional names
emails.body: That certainly makes sense to me. I had better talk to Paul about the appropriate procedures going forward. Bryan Seyfried 05/31/2000 09:36 AM

emails.subject: Re: additional names
emails.body: That certainly makes sense to me. I had better talk to Paul about the appropriate procedures going forward. Bryan Seyfried 05/31/2000 09:36 AM

emails.subject: Re: additional names
emails.body: I was assuming that Paul might have a process set up for the UK and that we could copy most of it. Do you know if he has created one already? Bryan Seyfried 05/31/2000 10:19 AM

emails.subject: Re: additional names
emails.body: I was assuming that Paul might have a process set up for the UK and that we could copy most of it. Do you know if he has created one already? Bryan Seyfried 05/31/2000 10:19 AM

emails.subject: Re: additional names
emails.body: now that we are officially behind a chinese wall can this process be reevaluated? I think that it will be increasingly difficult to scale at the pace we need to over the coming months if we can not design an automated process. Are we trying to avoid actually misusing confidential information or the perception of misusing the information? our intent is to begin to scale on a massive level from now until we have reached over a million reference credits. bs From: Mark Taylor on 31/05/2000 09:29 CDT
